description.zh: CTF杂项方向题目的详细解题指南，包括文件隐写、图片隐写、音频隐写、流量分析、取证分析等。
description.en: Detailed guide for CTF misc challenges, covering file steganography, image steganography, audio steganography, traffic analysis, forensics analysis, etc.

content.zh: 分析CTF杂项题目的常见类型和解题技巧
content.en: Analyze common types and solving techniques of CTF misc challenges

annotation.zh: 用户请求杂项题目分析

content.zh: 杂项题目范围广泛，包括文件隐写、流量分析、取证分析等。需要掌握各类文件格式和常用工具。
content.en: Misc challenges cover wide range including file steganography, traffic analysis, forensics. Need to master various file formats and common tools.

content.zh: 文件隐写：识别docx文件实际为zip格式，解压后在media目录发现隐藏flag图片
content.en: File steganography: Identify docx file is actually zip format, find hidden flag image in media directory after extraction

content.zh: 文件格式识别是杂项基础。通过文件头(魔术字节)判断真实格式，常用binwalk、file命令分析。
content.en: File format identification is misc foundation. Judge real format via file headers (magic bytes), commonly use binwalk, file command for analysis.

annotation.zh: 助手讲解文件格式分析

content.zh: 盲水印题目：两张相同图片通过BlindWaterMark工具提取隐藏水印信息
content.en: Blind watermark challenge: Two identical images extract hidden watermark information via BlindWaterMark tool

content.zh: 图片隐写常见技术：LSB隐写、EXIF信息、盲水印。遇到相似图片优先考虑盲水印。
content.en: Common image steganography techniques: LSB steganography, EXIF info, blind watermark. Consider blind watermark first for similar images.

annotation.zh: 助手讲解图片隐写技术

content.zh: 流量分析：SQL注入流量包通过二分法盲注特征提取flag，分析HTTP返回差异
content.en: Traffic analysis: SQL injection traffic packet extracts flag via binary blind injection characteristics, analyze HTTP response differences

content.zh: 音频隐写：通过Audacity调整播放速度，解码摩尔斯电码获取flag
content.en: Audio steganography: Adjust playback speed via Audacity, decode Morse code to get flag

content.zh: 杂项题目需要广泛的知识储备和工具使用经验，遇到未知情况多尝试不同工具和方法。
content.en: Misc challenges require broad knowledge reserve and tool usage experience, try different tools and methods for unknown situations.

annotation.zh: 助手总结杂项解题要点
